# catalystcenter_external_authentication_aaa_attribute (Data Source)

This data source can read the External Authentication AAA Attribute.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "catalystcenter_external_authentication_aaa_attribute" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object
- `name` (String) Name of the custom AAA attribute.
